---
layout: default
title: "Political Realignment and Legislative Developments in India"
date: 2026-07-10T11:22:01.288815+00:00
summary: "BJP secures former TMC leaders for Rajya Sabha seats, while Parliament advances key legislation on transgender rights and debates the \"One Nation, One Electi..."
run_time_ist: "4:52PM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Political Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 4:52PM</p>


<h2 class="section-title">India National Politics</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>BJP expands Rajya Sabha presence:</strong> The BJP has nominated three former Trinamool Congress MPs—Sushmita Dev, Sukhendu Sekhar Ray, and Prakash Chik Baraik—for Rajya Sabha bypolls immediately following their defection to the party.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I1</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi_?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I2</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I3</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I4</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I5</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I6</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I9</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I10</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I11</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I12</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMigAFBVV95cUxPNzk1a2lVNGhuQTlmWUpNMGwzaDRQV0xpUlM5LWtjOU9jNXpsQmRadHliLVlzTl9xSGd1a1pvVlYwdmtTSC16UHpfdFlkdUMzb3F3SVE0dnI2bl9mNU8xbmZvZWhIZDNUcTBSa0c0clE3YlI4YUFkVDlnR1lYMU9aTQ?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I14</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Legislative progress:</strong> Parliament has passed the Transgender Persons Amendment Bill, 2026, while a House panel chief indicated that the &quot;One Nation, One Election&quot; framework could be operational by the 2029 Lok Sabha polls.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I7</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I8</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiuwFBVV95cUxOS1Y3RmZzYUVKcWZEU082Q3J2S210X3k5NEVLdmVkbTY2TlBsNFZIR2FoWFBrQTFaMDYwcXE3clIzTDN4VV83US1LUmxwd2FVeVZsNW5YeVZHU0ZMUnJLZjhTVjBnRFE2Y2ZpZTMtOWVqYU1TX3BNTHRvZjhscE1yT1JsRjVFYnFITm9GbVVkNEdkVjFrSTNvYldVUU1zSjlGaVZoZDE3T0x1Vmx5VW5ONnNvc0xxQU5kTlkw?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I15</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Women&#x27;s reservation bill stalls:</strong> The Constitutional Amendment Bill aimed at providing reservation for women in the Lok Sabha and State Assemblies has failed to pass in the Lower House.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqwFBVV95cUxPSTVKRHVGUXlhNjVqNEczYkNpd1NvbmRYOU5Fd2RIZjV3OHBob0owSzh3LVRXdUVqSDNVZTgtbVZlUG8ybS1wallfSVdTeTRtNENIU0lwV3piczdxV2NEVmE0WC1GSTQyMjR4dkNPb1pqblB2SzNHQjZBRWVXZHpPZXE2bVlQc3NGNEFJVU1NUHJMMFFqSkdRUVFFMGZNRUkzSTc0LXphM1JaLXM?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I19</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I20</a></span></li>
</ul>

<h2 class="section-title">Policy and Institutions</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Federalism concerns:</strong> Congress leader Jairam Ramesh has urged NDA-ruled states to reject the VBSA Bill, alleging that the proposed legislation undermines India&#x27;s federal structure.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMitAFBVV95cUxQNnVqemJMNjQ0d0xKbjhQYnFCcU1QWmp6NVRwQkJrZnFqSVFwUHRpZERwT2pVMFRkT0pxTVc5dFlWNUVNbXhKOGNxRmlhTmRsbURhRWdMb2JUcTJzWlNzbVZnVUlTaENEOVFYdHRrbFBPbWMwQ3E0VEVtVTlQZnV0NmY0aG5USzVSVk90R3Q5TlJOVjN2b1Z5dTlXS09IRXkzWWY0Si1JYkxiQklsVDVWSU5CYkc?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W1</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W2</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Parliamentary oversight:</strong> The Public Accounts Committee (PAC) is currently reviewing a CAG report regarding contract lapses and the abandonment of defence buildings worth Rs 166 crore.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W3</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W7</a></span></li>
</ul>

  <li><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMigAFBVV95cUxPNzk1a2lVNGhuQTlmWUpNMGwzaDRQV0xpUlM5LWtjOU9jNXpsQmRadHliLVlzTl9xSGd1a1pvVlYwdmtTSC16UHpfdFlkdUMzb3F3SVE0dnI2bl9mNU8xbmZvZWhIZDNUcTBSa0c0clE3YlI4YUFkVDlnR1lYMU9aTQ?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">[I14] Three Former TMC Rajya Sabha MPs Join BJP - globalgovernancenews.com</a> globalgovernancenews.com</li>
